title: pgstat — Replication & WAL Overview
description: Fleet genelinde replikasyon lag, slot durumu, WAL uretimi, archiver. Bir satira tikla → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot r join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = r.instance_pk where r.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(max(r.replay_lag_bytes), 0) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot r join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = r.instance_pk where r.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot group by instance_pk) select count(*) filter (where s.active) as value from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot s join latest l on l.instance_pk = s.instance_pk and l.ts = s.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = s.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(w.period_wal_size_byte), 0) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where w.sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

panels.title: Replikasyon Lag — Per Primary (zaman serisi)
panels.description: Tüm primary'lerin replay lag'i. En yüksek olanlar dikkat gerektirir.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(r.snapshot_ts, $__interval), i.display_name || ' → ' || coalesce(r.application_name, r.client_addr::text, 'standby') as metric, max(r.replay_lag_bytes) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot r join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = r.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(r.snapshot_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by 1, i.display_name, coalesce(r.application_name, r.client_addr::text, 'standby') order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(w.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(w.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(snapshot_ts) as ts from fact.pg_replication_snapshot group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as primary_instance, coalesce(r.application_name, r.client_addr::text, '—') as standby, r.state, r.sync_state, r.replay_lag_bytes as lag_bytes, r.replay_lag::text as replay_lag_interval from fact.pg_replication_snapshot r join latest l on l.instance_pk = r.instance_pk and l.ts = r.snapshot_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = r.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by lag_bytes desc nulls last

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, s.slot_name, s.slot_type, s.active, s.wal_status, s.slot_lag_bytes as lag_bytes, s.safe_wal_size from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot s join latest l on l.instance_pk = s.instance_pk and l.ts = s.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = s.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by lag_bytes desc nulls last

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_archiver_snapshot group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, a.archived_count, a.last_archived_wal, a.last_archived_time, a.failed_count, a.last_failed_wal, a.last_failed_time from fact.pg_archiver_snapshot a join latest l on l.instance_pk = a.instance_pk and l.ts = a.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by a.failed_count desc nulls last, i.display_name
